---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

For collaboration inquiries, manuscript questions, or calculator-related correspondence, contact Julian Gendreau.

::: {.contact-card}
## Julian Gendreau

**Email:** [juliangendreau@gmail.com](mailto:juliangendreau@gmail.com)  
**GitHub:** [github.com/JulianGendreau](https://github.com/JulianGendreau)  
**X:** [@JulianGendreau](https://x.com/JulianGendreau)  
**ResearchGate:** [Julian Gendreau](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Julian-Gendreau)
:::

## Location

Oregon Health & Science University  
Department of Neurological Surgery  
Portland, Oregon
